notes: Agent self-reports task progress via an in-band hidden marker (irrlicht-eta) driven by an instruction-file rule. Vibe honors AGENTS.md at BOTH user ($VIBE_HOME/AGENTS.md) and project level (system_prompt.py:342-388, gated on include_project_context, injected verbatim with NO HTML-comment stripping), so a user can seed the task-eta marker rule → agent=yes. The vibe parser (parser.go:57-66) scans the FULL assistant content via tailer.ScanTaskEstimate/ScanTaskSummary and sets ev.TaskEstimate/ev.TaskSummary, which feed the SAME adapter-agnostic SessionMetrics.TaskEstimate {total_rounds,completed_rounds,updated_at} + ForecastTaskCompletion (elapsed/completed, burns down) + working-only presentation pipeline claudecode uses → daemon=full by construction. The PHASE DSL asserts only the user-observable lifecycle arc (multi-turn ready→working→ready to a ready finish); the estimate-content invariants (completed_rounds present + non-decreasing + reaching total; updated_at advancing; ETA present once ≥1 round + burning down; fields present only while working / absent at ready) live in acceptance_criteria + recipe verify[]. Driver gap: the scaffolded mistral-vibe driver stubs wait_turn (DRIVE_ELICITS='send slash sleep') — record ports SEAM 2 before driving. Emission is model-discretion; observations.model pinned to the default mistral-medium-3.5 (record corrects on drift). BACKFLOW (re-spec): mistral-vibe is a presession adapter — birth re-templated as presession_birth->session_birth(new_session) from the codex sibling (a transient proc-<PID> row is born ready before the real session_<id> transcript dir appears, then reconciles under a DIFFERENT session_id); every post-birth phase pins same_session_as session_birth. OBSERVATIONS: the offline replay golden cannot reproduce vibe's meta.json sidecar (model + tokens are sidecar-only, read live), so model and tokens are UNVERIFIABLE offline — like kiro-cli the observation vector asserts neither model nor tokens (agent only, cost_nonzero=false, tokens_nonzero=false).

text: proc-<PID> pre-session appears in ready within 1s of launch (PID bound before the transcript dir exists)
Real session_<id> reconciles (different session_id) when the transcript directory appears, born ready
vibe PID bound to the real session (matched by cwd)
First prompt (plan 5 phases, emit 0/5 then advance to 1/5) drives ready -> working; first marker emitted (total_rounds=5)
Turn 1 completes back to ready; completed_rounds=1
Phase-2 prompt drives ready -> working; marker advances toward 2/5
Turn 2 completes back to ready; ETA burns down
Phase-3 prompt drives ready -> working; marker advances toward 3/5
Phase-4 prompt drives ready -> working; marker advances toward 4/5
Final phase-5 prompt drives ready -> working; marker reaches 5/5
Final turn completes working -> ready; final session state is ready; ETA chip suppressed at ready
